patch.value: Deduplicate beads/todos index.ts package-runtime loader (install-safe mechanism needed)

Deferred from pm-ybfj. packages/pm-beads/extensions/beads/index.{ts,js} and packages/pm-todos/extensions/todos/index.{ts,js} still duplicate resolvePackageRootCandidates + loadRuntimeModule (the bootstrap that resolves the package's own runtime.js across candidate roots). This was NOT extracted to the SDK because index.js is intentionally SDK-import-free: when a package is installed it is copied to <pmRoot>/extensions/<name>/, where a static 'import ../../../../dist/sdk/index.js' resolves to a nonexistent path and silently fails extension load (reproduced: install beads then run -> unknown_command). The runtime.js dedup (commitImportedItem + value coercers via src/sdk/package-import-adapters.ts) shipped fine because runtime.js is resolved dynamically by the loader. To dedup the index loader safely, use a mechanism that does not require a static SDK import at index.js load time: e.g. (a) a tiny per-package generated loader stamped at build time from one template, or (b) inline a minimal shared snippet via codegen, or (c) have install rewrite the relative import. Keep .ts/.js twins byte-equivalent. Differences are only: extension dir name, package dir name, diagnostic label. Acceptance: index loaders share a single source-of-truth without breaking standalone/copied installs; package smoke + cli.integration install tests stay green.
